parameters.query:
SELECT set_config('app.company_code', $1, true);
SELECT o.sap_doc_num AS "DocNum", o.sap_doc_entry AS "DocEntry",
       o.business_partner AS "CardCode", o.bp_name AS "CardName",
       o.sap_status AS "DocStatus", o.due_date AS "DocDueDate",
       ol.line_num AS "LineNum", ol.item_code AS "ItemCode",
       ol.item_name AS "ItemName", COALESCE(ol.uom, ic.uom, '') AS uom,
       COALESCE(ic.man_batch_num, 'N') AS "ManBtchNum",
       ol.quantity AS "Quantity",
       COALESCE(ol.open_quantity, 0) AS "OpenQty",
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(ol.open_quantity, 0) <= 0 THEN 'C' ELSE 'O' END AS "LineStatus",
       ol.warehouse_code AS "WhsCode", '' AS "WhsName",
       o.sync_status AS "SyncStatus"
FROM oms.orders o
JOIN oms.order_lines ol ON ol.order_id = o.id AND ol.company_code = o.company_code
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_items_cache ic ON ic.company_code = o.company_code AND ic.item_code = ol.item_code
WHERE o.company_code = $1
  AND o.doc_type = 'PO'
  AND o.sap_doc_num = $2
  AND o.parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY ol.line_num

SELECT t.id, t.quantity, t.performed_by, t.remarks,
       t.transaction_time, t.item_code, t.item_name,
       dl.line_num, d.id AS document_id, d.wms_status AS doc_wms_status
FROM wms.wms_documents d
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_transactions t ON t.document_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_document_lines dl ON t.line_id = dl.id
WHERE d.company_code = $1
  AND d.doc_type = 'PO'
  AND d.doc_number = $2
ORDER BY t.transaction_time DESC
